# settingValue(_:)

**Instance Method**

Returns a new value for an existing label and identifier.

## Declaration

```swift
func settingValue(_ value: ValueType) -> Self
```

## Parameters

- **value**: A new value for the copied labeled value object. For valid values, see [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNContact] properties that are arrays of labeled value objects.

## Return Value

The [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNLabeledValue] object with an existing label and identifier.

## Setting labels and values

- **settingLabel(_:)**: Returns a labeled value object with an existing value and identifier.
- **settingLabel(_:value:)**: Returns a labeled value object with the specified label and value with the existing identifier.
